findings.detail: 14 states of mononuclear phagocytes identified in human skin, including monocyte-derived DCs (mo-DCs)
PAGA analysis revealed mo-DC differentiation branch with moDC1, moDC2, moDC3 subtypes representing progressive maturation states
moDC_2 is an intermediate maturation state in the mo-DC differentiation branch, positioned between moDC_1 and the fully mature moDC_3 which expresses DC maturation genes
